title: Logo Design & Challenge Coin Artwork
brief: Title: Logo Design & Challenge Coin Artwork Needed Description: I am looking for an experienced vector designer to create a clean logo design and challenge coin artwork. This project is focused only on logo design and coin-ready vector artwork. I already have concept images and visual references for the logo and coin designs. I need a designer who can turn those concepts into polished, professional, true vector artwork that can be used for challenge coins, branding, web, print, social media, and merchandise. Project scope: 1. Create/refine a clean vector logo 2. Create/refine four symbolic challenge coin designs based on my provided references 3. Prepare coin-ready artwork that can be sent to a mint/manufacturer 4. Provide files that can also be used for web, print, and merchandise Design direction: * Clean, premium, minimal * Strong symbolic marks * Serious brand feel * Works in black, white, gold, and silver * Readable at small sizes * True vector artwork, not raster images * Simple enough for challenge coin production * Not cartoonish * Not generic clip art * Not overly decorative Deliverables requested: * Editable Adobe Illustrator file or equivalent vector source file * SVG files * EPS or vector PDF files * Transparent PNG exports * Black version * White version * Gold version * Silver/gray version * Coin-ready artwork files for manufacturer review * Simple logo lockup if appropriate Budget: Fixed price: $400 This is for the first production-ready vector artwork phase: r
